case_title: CHINESE COMMUNITY HOUSING CORPORATION vs. BRADSHAW, CHARLES et al

DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT BRADSHAW, CHARLES

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINESE COMMUNITY HOUSING CORPORATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-05-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 02 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-12-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE WICK/B.FIELDS, REPORTER JACQUELINE WOODS FOR THE PLTF. CHARLES BRADSHAW, DEFT PRESENT. 9:55 AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION WAS READ INTO THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: PLTF TO HAVE JUDGEMENT FOR R&P OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 385 EDDY ST, #505. RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED. WRIT TO ISSUE BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 5-14-94, 5PM. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS. PLTF TO RETAIN SEC DEPOSIT BUT WAIVES ANY RENT/DAMAGES. DEFT WAIVES ALL CLAIMS. PLTF COUNSEL TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRADSHAW, CHARLES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 385 EDDY STREET, #505 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY UNTIL 14-MAY-94
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
